rationale: The proposed change concerns the residence homestead exemption amount under Tax Code §11.13(b). Educ. Code §11.304 governs write-in voting procedures for common school district board elections. The two provisions are unrelated; no conflict exists.
quote: Sec. 11.304. WRITE-IN VOTING: COMMON SCHOOL DISTRICT BOARD ELECTION.
_note: Rule text is entirely unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption change; no overlap in subject matter.
